title: Smoky Kenyan Stew
description: A hearty, slow-cooked stew originating from Kenya, infused with smoky flavors.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pan over medium-high heat.
Brown the stew meat in batches, then set aside.
Add onions and garlic to the pan and sauté until softened.
Add the kenyan potatoes, carrots, and tagine spice blend. Cook for 5 minutes.
Add the browned meat, tomatoes, water, and smoky paprika. Stir well.
Bring the stew to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 1 hour.
Serve hot with pillowy naan bread.
Garnish with chopped fresh herbs, if desired.
